Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Get ready for battle!}
Loot the Weapon Rack
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{准备作战！}
搜刮武器架

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to pick up items or
use the Interact button
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}以拾取物品
或使用交换按钮

Text.en: <tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to pick up <gem>{Skill Gem}
Text.zh: <tutorialgesture>{[点击]}以拾取<gem>{技能宝石}

Text.en:
<gem>{Skill gems} <tutorialgesture>{must be equipped 
to harness its power}
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to open your Character Menu
Text.zh:
<gem>{技能宝石} <tutorialgesture>{只有装备后
才能发挥作用}
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}打开角色菜单

Text.en: Navigate to the Skills Tab
Text.zh: 前往技能页面

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Drag and Drop]} the <gem>{Skill Gem}
into a skill gem socket
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}<gem>{技能宝石}
放入技能宝石插槽

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{New skill acquired!}
Close the Character Menu
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{获得了新的技能！}
关闭角色菜单

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} or <tutorialgesture>{[Tap-Hold]} to
display item information
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[按下]}或 <tutorialgesture>{[长按]}以
显示物品信息

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Drag and Drop]} the <gem>{Skill gem}
to take the item
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}<gem>{技能宝石}
以获取物品

Text.en: Pick up <gem>{Support Gem}
Text.zh: 拾取<gem>{辅助宝石}

Text.en:
<gem>{Support gems} <tutorialgesture>{are used to augment 
your} <gem>{Skill gems}
Open your Character Menu
Text.zh:
<gem>{辅助宝石}<tutorialgesture>{可以强化
你的}<gem>{技能宝石}
打开角色菜单

Text.en: Navigate to the Skills Tab
Text.zh: 前往技能页面

Text.en:
Place the <gem>{Support Gem} into
a support socket of the same colour
Text.zh:
将<gem>{辅助宝石}放入
相同颜色的辅助插槽中

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Your skill has been augmented!}
Close the Character Menu
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{你的技能强化了！}
关闭角色菜单

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{You have taken damage!}
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} a Life Flask or
your Life Orb to recover
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{你受到了伤害！}
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}生命药剂或
生命球以恢复生命值

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Combat has begun!}
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to attack
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{战斗开始了！}
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}以攻击

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Welcome to the Atlas of Worlds!}
To get started, we will introduce 
some controls
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{欢迎浏览异界图鉴！}
我们首先来介绍一下
控制方式吧

Text.en: <tutorialgesture>{[Drag]} to look around
Text.zh: <tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}以四处查看

Text.en: <tutorialgesture>{[Pinch]} to zoom in on the Atlas
Text.zh: <tutorialgesture>{[双指捏合]}放大异界图鉴

Text.en: <tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to select the map
Text.zh: <tutorialgesture>{[点击]}以选择地图

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{The Map Device only creates six Portals to an Area}
This means there are only six Entrances before an Area is closed permanently. Tread carefully!
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{地图装置只能开通前往一个区域的六扇时空之门}
这表示开启某个区域的六个入口后，该区域就会永久关闭。要小心脚下！

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Introducing the Character Passive Skill Tree!}
Skill points are used to enhance your character
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{认识一下角色天赋树！}
天赋点数可以增强你的角色

Text.en: <tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} Passive Skill to see its Stats
Text.zh: <tutorialgesture>{[点击]}天赋查看其属性

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} Assign Mode button
to start Allocating
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}分配模式按键
开始配置

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to select a Passive Skill
to allocate
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}选择一个天赋
进行分配

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap-Hold]} Confirm button to apply changes
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} Passive Skill again to deselect
and choose another option
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[长按]}确认按键应用更改
再次<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}天赋可以取消
并选择其他的选项

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Your character has grown in power!}
Skill points are gained through levelling up, 
and completing certain quests.
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{你的角色变强了！}
天赋点数会在升级时，
以及完成特定任务时获得。

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Portal Scrolls are used to create Checkpoints}
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} the Portal Button to create a portal 
back to town.
<tutorialgesture>{Reminder:} You only have six Portals before the Map Device must be Reactivated!
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{传送卷轴可以创造出记录点}
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}时空之门按钮可以打开一扇时空之门
并返回城镇。
<tutorialgesture>{请注意：}你只能开启六个时空之门，随后就要重新激活地图装置了！

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{The Minimap can be used to help navigate the Area}
Expand the map by <tutorialgesture>{[Tapping]} the Minimap
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{小地图可以帮助你在区域中导航}
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}小地图可以展开地图

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Drag]} the Joystick to move the Map
Close the Map Overlay by <tutorialgesture>{[Tapping]} the Joystick
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}摇杆可以移动地图
 <tutorialgesture>{[点击]}摇杆可以关闭层叠地图

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Virtue Gem Crafting}
Gem Artisans can craft Uncut Gems to unleash Skills within
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{古灵宝石工艺}
宝石匠可以雕琢未切割的宝石，释放出其中潜藏的技能

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Drag]} the Uncut Skill Gem
into crafting slot
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}未切割的技能宝石
将其放入工艺栏位

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Swipe]} through the Archetypes
to see available Skills
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} the Skill Icons to view the
details of the Virtue
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[滑动]}浏览流派
即可查看可用的技能
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}技能图标
查看详情

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} the Engrave button 
to create a new <gem>{Skill Gem}
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}铭刻按钮
制作一颗新的<gem>{技能宝石}

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{This Skill requirements a higher
Item Level Uncut Skill Gem}
Pick a new skill to Engrave
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{该技能需要更高
物品等级的未切割的技能宝石}
选择一个新技能进行铭刻

Text.en: <tutorialgesture>{[Drag]} the <gem>{Skill Gem} back to your Inventory
Text.zh: <tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}<gem>{技能宝石}，放回背包之中

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Tutorial Complete!}
When you are ready to equip the crafted <gem>{Skill Gem} 
go to the Skills menu and drag it into the slot
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{你完成了教程！}
等你准备好装备自己制作的<gem>{技能宝石}了，
只需打开技能菜单，将它拖入栏位

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{Your character has two Weapon Sets}
Weapon Sets switch automatically to meet Skill requirements as they are used, but switching weapons takes time!
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{你的角色拥有两套武器组}
使用技能时，武器组会根据技能要求而自动切换，但切换武器是需要时间的！

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{You have found an unidentified Item}
An Item must be identified before
it can be equipped
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{你找到了一件未鉴定的物品}
物品必须经过鉴定
才可以装备

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Drag]} and use a Scroll of Wisdom
on an unidentified Item
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[拖动]}知识卷轴
并对未鉴定的物品使用

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{The Item is now identified}
In each Town, There will be a Vendor who will identify all your Items free of charge!
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{物品完成了鉴定}
每个城镇中都有一位可以免费鉴定物品的商人！

Text.en:
<tutorialgesture>{[Tap]} to use the Well
Wells restore Life, Mana, and Flask Charges
Text.zh:
<tutorialgesture>{[点击]}使用水井
水井可以恢复生命、魔力和药剂充能
